meaning: vt.娱乐,招待,接受,怀抱vi.款待
examples: I don't like to entertain guests anymore.
She had to entertain some boring local bigwigs.
The aim of the series is both to entertain and inform.
The tournament begins in Guyana on Friday with Sri Lanka facing New Zealand before West Indies entertain Ireland.
We are happy to buy a movie ticket and pay actors to entertain us.
